wiki.summary: Billyeoon Goyangi (Do The Dance) is ILLIT's 3rd EP "bomb's" title track, released on June 16, 2025. It's genre is French House. Ironically, they use French in the lyrics. Billyeoon Goyangi, is borrowed cat/rent-a-cat in English. It is a Korean idiom that refers to someone who remains quiet and detached in a lively gathering, not participating in the socializing or chatter. While the English title, Do The Dance, contrasts it. The lyric, "so cryptic, like a rollercoaster ride" represents the unpredictability of the singer's love interest. Read more on Last.fm.
wiki.content: Billyeoon Goyangi (Do The Dance) is ILLIT's 3rd EP "bomb's" title track, released on June 16, 2025. It's genre is French House. Ironically, they use French in the lyrics. Billyeoon Goyangi, is borrowed cat/rent-a-cat in English. It is a Korean idiom that refers to someone who remains quiet and detached in a lively gathering, not participating in the socializing or chatter. While the English title, Do The Dance, contrasts it. The lyric, "so cryptic, like a rollercoaster ride" represents the unpredictability of the singer's love interest. The singer, at first introverted, but the curiosity, make them want to ask them out and dance. And they are struggling whether or not to ask them out, as the song progresses they start being more forward about asking their love interest out. Read more on Last.fm.
